LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: High score entries submitted by players

score.description: The score achieved by the player

UserMissions.title: UserMissions
UserMissions.description: Daily mission progress for a specific player on a given date

playerId.description: The unique device ID of the player

date.description: The date of the daily mission (YYYY-MM-DD)

clearedCakes.description: Number of Cake tiles cleared today

clearedSwords.description: Number of Sword tiles cleared today

claimedCakes.description: Whether the Cake mission rewards have been claimed

claimedSwords.description: Whether the Sword mission rewards have been claimed

claimedWinStreak.description: Whether the Win Streak mission rewards have been claimed

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last progress update

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: General profile and calendar progress for a player

playerId.description: The unique ID of the player

claimedLoginDays.description: List of dates (YYYY-MM-DD) on which daily login rewards were claimed

claimedOccasions.description: List of occasion IDs (e.g. 'christmas_2026') that have been claimed

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last profile update

/userProfiles/{profileId}.description: User specific profile and daily calendar/occasion claims
